elements.original_description: A frustrated cartoon person stands in front of a pile of empty wallets and credit cards, looking overwhelmed. The background is pure white.
elements.image_prompt: A 2D flat vector cartoon illustration of a frustrated person with an overwhelmed expression, standing in front of a scattered pile of empty wallets and credit cards. The illustration is a professional 2D minimalist icon on a pure white background, rendered in clean flat vector art with high contrast and no shading or gradients, conveying a sense of financial stress.
